3295690.name: Bladeforge: Ascension Crusade
3295690.description:
BladeForge: Ascension Crusade is a tactical RPG that combines strategy, exploration, and resource management in the fantasy world of Valthir. Players take on the role of a Bladeforger, a master forger of weapons imbued with the power of the legendary Arcanix, mystical artifacts capable of altering reality. Lead your faction on an epic crusade to claim the Arcanix of Creation by customizing your units, managing your crusade, and facing enemies in turn-based tactical battles.

Strategic Combat: Fight in a turn-based combat system where every decision matters. Control your units on a grid-based battlefield and use terrain and your characters' abilities to gain the upper hand.

Forging and Customization: Create powerful Radiant Weapons using Arcanix, imbuing your weapons with elements like fire, water, earth, or air, and enhancing the capabilities of your units.

Management and Expansion: Build and upgrade your caravan, gather resources, and recruit new units to strengthen your faction in their quest to dominate Valthir.

Real-Time Exploration: Navigate a vast world filled with secrets, where every choice affects the fate of your faction.

Multifaction Gameplay: Choose from various races, each with unique abilities and traits, including Humans, Jabals, Valkorians, Azarim, and more.

Prepare for a journey filled with deep strategy, epic battles, and an immersive narrative that will shape the destiny of the world.
3295690.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
*具有完全音频支持的语言
